_comment: Trigger-first capability routing for boot output. Rendered by scripts/capabilities.py into the CAPABILITIES block. Override in-session via config('capability-map') — same pattern as ops-topics. kind=protocol rows render verbatim (optional `exists` path probe gates environment-specific rows; {skills} expands to the skills mount). kind=skill rows pull their trigger text live from the skill's SKILL.md frontmatter description at render time, so this file lists names only and cannot rot; an optional `when` field overrides the pulled description. Curation over completeness — boot_ledger measures whether entries earn their tokens.

entries.when: "What do we know about X?" / "have we done this before?" / prior art — BEFORE re-solving or answering from training data
entries.reach: mountpoint -q /mnt/muninn && grep -l 'X' /mnt/muninn/memories/*.md; if unmounted or no hits, recall('X')

entries.when: About to write "yesterday", "recently", "a few months ago", or any duration word
entries.reach: ground it first — cat /tmp/LOCAL_DATE, memory timestamps, git log; never narrative time
